name: SomeIpSetData
title: SomeIpSetData
syntax: long SomeIpSetData( dword messageHandle, dword dataLength, char data[] );
description: This function can be used to set the payload of a SOME/IP message. If data in the payload of the message already exist, the data will be overwritten with this function call.
If necessary the length field in the SOME/IP Message Header will be adapted at the function call.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the received SOME/IP message (see OnSomeIpMessage)
